# Kira

> A lightweight ticket troubleshooting application for AIOps teams. External AI agents submit diagnostic tickets via API; human SRE operators review, validate, and action recommendations via an optional React dashboard.

## Key Facts

- Monorepo: Python 3.13+ backend (FastAPI) + React 19 frontend (Vite)
- Database: PostgreSQL 16, ORM via SQLAlchemy 2.0, migrations via Alembic
- Package manager: uv (not pip)
- Auth: API key for agents (X-API-Key header), session/password for humans
- Env var prefix: KIRA_
- 44 tests (pytest, SQLite in-memory), frontend build check via npm run build
- OpenAPI 3.1 spec: docs/api/openapi.yaml

## Project Instructions

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Conventions, how to run, key gotchas

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md): Full getting started guide, API usage, configuration, deployment options
- [docs/deploying-to-openshift.md](docs/deploying-to-openshift.md): OpenShift/Kubernetes deployment guide
- [docs/iframe-embedding.md](docs/iframe-embedding.md): Iframe embedding for Showroom/lab environments
- [docs/api/openapi.yaml](docs/api/openapi.yaml): OpenAPI 3.1 spec (YAML) — regenerate with `make openapi`

## Backend — Core

- [api/main.py](api/main.py): FastAPI app factory, middleware, router mounting
- [api/core/config.py](api/core/config.py): Pydantic Settings (KIRA_ env vars)
- [api/core/deps.py](api/core/deps.py): Dependency injection (current user, auth)
- [api/db/models.py](api/db/models.py): SQLAlchemy ORM models (User, Ticket, AuditLog, Comment, Artifact, ChatMessage, Webhook)
- [api/db/session.py](api/db/session.py): Database engine and session factory
- [api/seed.py](api/seed.py): Demo data seeder (4 users, 5 tickets)

## Backend — Pydantic Schemas

- [api/models/enums.py](api/models/enums.py): AreaEnum, StatusEnum, SourceEnum, RoleEnum, SeverityEnum, IssueStatusEnum
- [api/models/tickets.py](api/models/tickets.py): TicketCreate, TicketUpdate, TicketResponse
- [api/models/comments.py](api/models/comments.py): CommentCreate, CommentResponse
- [api/models/artifacts.py](api/models/artifacts.py): ArtifactResponse
- [api/models/users.py](api/models/users.py): UserCreate, UserResponse
- [api/models/audit.py](api/models/audit.py): AuditLogResponse
- [api/models/chat.py](api/models/chat.py): ChatSendRequest, ChatMessageResponse, ChatInfoResponse
- [api/models/auth.py](api/models/auth.py): LoginRequest
- [api/models/issues.py](api/models/issues.py): IssueCreate, IssueUpdate, IssueResponse, IssueListResponse

## Backend — Routes

- [api/routes/tickets.py](api/routes/tickets.py): Ticket CRUD with filtering, skills normalization, audit trail
- [api/routes/comments.py](api/routes/comments.py): Add/list comments on tickets
- [api/routes/artifacts.py](api/routes/artifacts.py): Upload/list/download file attachments
- [api/routes/audit.py](api/routes/audit.py): Query audit trail per ticket
- [api/routes/auth.py](api/routes/auth.py): Login, logout, session info
- [api/routes/users.py](api/routes/users.py): Admin user management
- [api/routes/dashboard.py](api/routes/dashboard.py): Aggregated statistics
- [api/routes/enums.py](api/routes/enums.py): Valid values for areas, statuses, roles
- [api/routes/chat.py](api/routes/chat.py): Streaming LLM proxy with per-ticket history
- [api/routes/issues.py](api/routes/issues.py): Issue CRUD — list, get, patch issues; create issue on ticket
- [api/routes/webhooks.py](api/routes/webhooks.py): Webhook registration (dispatcher not yet implemented)

## Backend — Services

- [api/services/audit.py](api/services/audit.py): Audit log entry creation helper
- [api/services/artifacts.py](api/services/artifacts.py): Filesystem artifact storage

## Backend — Auth

- [api/auth/api_key.py](api/auth/api_key.py): X-API-Key header validation
- [api/auth/passwords.py](api/auth/passwords.py): bcrypt hash/verify
- [api/auth/session.py](api/auth/session.py): Cookie session management

## Frontend

- [frontend/src/App.tsx](frontend/src/App.tsx): React Router setup with ThemeProvider
- [frontend/src/types.ts](frontend/src/types.ts): TypeScript interfaces matching API schemas
- [frontend/src/api/client.ts](frontend/src/api/client.ts): Fetch wrapper for all API endpoints
- [frontend/src/theme/themes.ts](frontend/src/theme/themes.ts): Solarized dark/light theme tokens
- [frontend/src/theme/ThemeProvider.tsx](frontend/src/theme/ThemeProvider.tsx): Theme context + CSS variable injection

## Frontend — Pages

- [frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx](frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx): Login form
- [frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx](frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx): Summary cards, charts, recent tickets
- [frontend/src/pages/TicketList.tsx](frontend/src/pages/TicketList.tsx): Filterable ticket table
- [frontend/src/pages/TicketDetail.tsx](frontend/src/pages/TicketDetail.tsx): Full ticket view with editable lozenges, skills, comments, audit, chat, issues
- [frontend/src/pages/IssueList.tsx](frontend/src/pages/IssueList.tsx): Filterable issue backlog table
- [frontend/src/pages/IssueDetail.tsx](frontend/src/pages/IssueDetail.tsx): Full issue view with markdown rendering, edit, status/priority controls

## Frontend — Components

- [frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx](frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx): Nav bar with theme toggle
- [frontend/src/components/Lozenge.tsx](frontend/src/components/Lozenge.tsx): Color-coded tags for area, risk, confidence, status
- [frontend/src/components/ValueEditDialog.tsx](frontend/src/components/ValueEditDialog.tsx): Slider + comment dialog for risk/confidence editing
- [frontend/src/components/InfoPopover.tsx](frontend/src/components/InfoPopover.tsx): Scale guideline popovers
- [frontend/src/components/SkillTag.tsx](frontend/src/components/SkillTag.tsx): Compact skill tag
- [frontend/src/components/SkillEditor.tsx](frontend/src/components/SkillEditor.tsx): Inline skill add/remove editor
- [frontend/src/components/AuditTimeline.tsx](frontend/src/components/AuditTimeline.tsx): Audit history display
- [frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx](frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx): Floating AI chat assistant
- [frontend/src/components/IssueCard.tsx](frontend/src/components/IssueCard.tsx): Collapsible issue card with promote/dismiss/edit actions
- [frontend/src/components/MarkdownRenderer.tsx](frontend/src/components/MarkdownRenderer.tsx): Shared markdown renderer with syntax highlighting
- [frontend/src/components/TerminalPanel.tsx](frontend/src/components/TerminalPanel.tsx): Resizable embedded terminal panel with ttyd iframe and pop-out

## Deployment

- [compose.yaml](compose.yaml): Podman/Docker Compose (api + frontend + postgres + ttyd)
- [deploy/Dockerfile.api](deploy/Dockerfile.api): Multi-stage Python 3.13 + uv
- [deploy/Dockerfile.frontend](deploy/Dockerfile.frontend): Node build + nginx
- [deploy/Dockerfile.ttyd](deploy/Dockerfile.ttyd): UBI9-based troubleshooting image with ttyd, kubectl, oc, neovim, Claude Code
- [deploy/ttyd-entrypoint.sh](deploy/ttyd-entrypoint.sh): ttyd container entrypoint
- [deploy/ttyd-session.sh](deploy/ttyd-session.sh): Session wrapper with ticket context env vars
- [deploy/nginx.conf](deploy/nginx.conf): Frontend nginx with API proxy (blocks iframing by default)
- [deploy/nginx-iframe.conf](deploy/nginx-iframe.conf): Iframe-friendly nginx config for lab/Showroom environments
- [deploy/helm/kira/](deploy/helm/kira/): Helm chart with OpenShift Route support
- [deploy/helm/kira/values.yaml](deploy/helm/kira/values.yaml): Default Helm values
- [deploy/helm/kira/values-openshift.yaml](deploy/helm/kira/values-openshift.yaml): OpenShift overrides
- [deploy/k8s/](deploy/k8s/): Plain Kubernetes manifests (teaching/quick start)
- [deploy/argocd/application.yaml](deploy/argocd/application.yaml): Example ArgoCD Application

## Quick Commands

- `make dev` — Start full local dev stack
- `make test` — Run backend tests
- `make check` — Tests + frontend build
- `make openapi` — Regenerate OpenAPI spec
- `make deploy-openshift` — Deploy to OpenShift via Helm
- `make help` — Show all available targets
